home.heroSubtitle: Whether you're a fresh graduate, a parent re-entering the workforce, or someone ready for a career change — NAIK gives you the tools, knowledge, and confidence to rise.
home.flowSub: You don't need a laptop or lots of time — just a phone and 15 minutes to start. Each step moves you closer to a better income.
home.flow1Desc: Sign up free in 60 seconds. Your profile saves your progress so everything on NAIK is personalised to you.
home.flow2Desc: 5 quick questions about your interests, skills, and income goal. Takes under 3 minutes. Your answers drive everything.
home.flow3Desc: NAIK instantly shows the 3 jobs best matched to your quiz answers, with salary ranges and a personalised "why it fits you" explanation.
home.flow4Desc: Heart any job to save it — from your recommendations or the explore page. Saved jobs unlock your personalised career roadmap.
home.flow5Desc: Each saved job comes with a step-by-step roadmap: where to apply today, free courses to take, and how to reach your salary target.
home.flow6Desc: Use the AI Mock Interview and CV Builder to walk into any interview with confidence — all free, no laptop needed.
home.skillupHeading: Turn What You Know Into What Employers Want.
home.skillupDesc: You already have more experience than you think. NAIK's AI-powered tools help you package it, practise for interviews, and walk into any room with confidence.
home.skillupFeat1: AI CV Builder — build a full CV or polish everyday experience into professional language
home.skillupFeat2: Step-by-step wizard with 3 templates, live preview, and PDF export
home.skillupFeat3: Mock Interview tool — practice with real questions, get instant feedback
home.skillupFeat4: Voice-only interview mode — no laptop needed
home.skillupFeat5: WhatsApp message templates to follow up on applications
home.skillupFeat6: Portfolio Builder for freelancers and creatives
home.skillupStat1D: more callbacks with an AI-polished CV
home.skillupStat2D: to build your first CV on NAIK
home.skillupTestimonial: "The CV builder changed how I saw myself. I didn't know my pasar malam experience was 'customer service management'."
home.hiredHeading:
Real Jobs. Real Deadlines.
All in One Place.
home.hiredDesc: No more jumping between five different apps. NAIK brings together part-time listings, skilled trades, gig platforms, and scholarship opportunities — filtered for Malaysians, with reminders so you never miss a deadline.
home.hiredFeat1: Part-time & shift-based jobs across all 14 states
home.hiredFeat2: Gig economy guide — Grab, Lalamove, Shopee, Fiver & more
home.hiredFeat4: Skilled trades board — plumbing, electrical, F&B, retail
home.hiredFeat5: Referral network — get referred by NAIK community members
home.hiredStat3D: average monthly earnings gained by users
home.hiredTestimonial: "I found a part-time warehouse shift that fits around my kids' school hours. I never would have found it on my own."
home.forherHeading:
She Carries the Home.
NAIK Carries Her Forward.
home.forherDesc: Half of Malaysian women aren't in the workforce — but many want to be. NAIK's For Her section is built specifically for mothers, caregivers, and women returning after a break.
home.forherFeat2: Skills that are already valued — childcare, cooking, admin, teaching
home.forherFeat3: Micro-businesses — how to sell on Shopee, TikTok, Instagram
home.forherFeat5: Community peer groups — real women, real support
home.forherFeat6: Personal safety at work — recognising harassment
home.forherStat1D: of Malaysian women outside the workforce
home.forherStat2D: want to re-enter but don't know how
home.forherStat3D: avg. monthly income from home-based work
home.forherTestimonial: "I thought my career was over when I had my baby. NAIK showed me it was just beginning again."
home.aboutDesc: Millions of Malaysians are capable, talented, and hardworking — but lack the right information, support, and access to move up.
home.problemItem1: 50% of Malaysian women are economically inactive, often due to family responsibilities
home.problemItem2: Many job seekers don't know their legal rights as workers
home.problemItem3: Information on real job opportunities is scattered or in English only
home.problemItem4: No affordable, accessible career coaching for low-income groups
home.problemItem5: Niche jobs exist but aren't visible to the people who need them
home.problemItem6: No "first-step" resource that works on low data / older phones
home.solutionDesc: Free, multilingual, mobile-first. Designed with and for the communities it serves.
home.solutionItem1: Career quiz that matches you to real, reachable jobs in Malaysia
home.solutionItem2: AI-powered tools to write your CV and practise interviews
home.solutionItem3: Plain-language guide to your rights as a worker
home.solutionItem4: A dedicated section for women re-entering the workforce
home.solutionItem5: Scholarship and gig economy listings with deadline reminders
home.testi1Quote: The career quiz matched me to delivery driving. I didn't think that counted as a 'career' — now I earn RM 2,400 a month and set my own hours.
home.testi2Quote: NAIK's CV builder turned my market stall experience into something I was proud to send to employers. I got called back within a week.
home.testi3Quote: I hadn't worked in four years after my second child. NAIK's 'For Her' section showed me flexible jobs near my area and helped me write my first CV. Now I tutor during school hours.
home.teamDesc: A small team of students and professionals who believe everyone deserves a fair chance at economic dignity.

skills.heroSub: Click any saved job to see your step-by-step career roadmap, then use our free tools to prepare and apply with confidence.
skills.savedLabel: Your Saved Jobs — Click to View Roadmap
skills.savedSub: Each saved job has a personalised career roadmap — real steps, free courses, and salary targets built around your quiz answers.
skills.savedSignIn: Sign in to save jobs and see your personalised career roadmaps here.
skills.toolsSub: Three free tools built for women returning to work after a career break — no judgment, just practical help.
skills.mockDesc: Practise the hard employment gap questions until your break becomes your strength — not something to apologise for.
skills.cvBuildDesc: Turn your caregiving years into powerful CV bullet points. Reframe your break as the real, transferable skills it was.
skills.resourcesDesc: Know your maternity rights, vet gig work safely, and use ready-made templates to follow up on jobs — all free.

interview.heroParagraph: Practise in English, Bahasa Melayu, or Mandarin — anytime, for free.
interview.tip: Speak naturally — the AI responds in whichever language you use. Your answers are never saved.
interview.startSub:
A friendly AI interviewer will guide you through a short mock interview.
Answer each question out loud.
interview.statusIdle: Ready — tap the mic to answer
interview.tooShort: Recording too short — hold the button a bit longer
interview.micDenied: Microphone access denied. Please allow mic access.

explore.signInToSave: Sign in to save jobs and get your personalised roadmap.
explore.heartToSave: Heart any job in Explore to save it here.

footer.tagline: a free, community-driven platform helping Malaysians find work, build skills, and know their rights.
